description_long: This object is a square patch of vibrant green grass, with blades rendered in a stylized, angular fashion, giving the surface a jagged, geometric appearance. The grass sits atop a layer of dark brown soil, which is visible at the base and along the edges, providing a naturalistic foundation. The grass blades are densely packed, creating a lush and healthy look, with varying heights and orientations that add visual complexity. The patch is bordered by a clean, straight edge, suggesting it is a defined section rather than a naturally spreading area. The soil beneath the grass appears compact and slightly textured, contrasting with the soft, spiky look of the grass above. This type of grass patch would typically be found in urban parks, residential lawns, or landscaped public spaces.
description: A dense, square patch of bright green, angular grass blades atop a dark brown soil base, bordered by clean, straight edges. The grass appears lush and healthy, with a visually striking, geometric texture.
description_view_0: From this angle, the grass blades appear tallest and most jagged, with the brown soil base clearly visible along the front edge.
description_view_1: This view shows a slightly lower profile of the grass, with the density and angularity of the blades still prominent and the soil edge visible at the front.
description_view_2: Here, the grass patch appears more uniform in height, with the geometric pattern of the blades and the soil base both clearly visible.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the dense clustering of the grass blades, with the soil base forming a strong, straight boundary at the front.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_e: The grass patch is sharply separated from adjacent surfaces by a straight, clean edge, with a clear transition from grass to soil and no blending into other elements.
